sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53512" key="*karua/teia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κᾰρῠάτεια</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱτ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, festival of Artemis <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Καρυᾶτις</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
